meta.title: 2erre SRL — Digital partner for Italian businesses
meta.description: Software, web and mobile development, AI consulting and custom tools to grow your business.

hero.subtitle: We design, build and scale software, web and mobile products for Italian SMBs.

services.subtitle: From consulting to product: we build with you or hand you the keys.

consulting.title: Consulting & Strategy
consulting.body: We map processes, identify bottlenecks and build a pragmatic technical roadmap for digital growth.

web.title: Web & Brand
web.body: Fast, SEO-ready, fully responsive sites on modern stacks (Next.js, Tailwind) designed to convert.

apps.title: iOS & Android apps
apps.body: Native and React Native apps, from prototype to store release, with CI/CD, analytics and crash reporting.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.body: We bring LLMs into your processes: WhatsApp/Slack agents, knowledge bases, automations with Make, n8n, Zapier.

consulting.hero: A clear roadmap before we write a single line of code.
consulting.intro: Most digital projects fail because they start without real context analysis. We start there: we map processes, constraints and goals, then hand you an executable strategy — not an 80-slide deck.

process.title: Discovery
process.body: Stakeholder interviews, workflow analysis, technical audit and market benchmarks. We leave this phase knowing exactly what to build and why.

process.title: Strategy & Roadmap
process.body: We define priorities, milestones and KPIs. We pick the right stack for your team and budget, skipping trendy buzzwords.

process.title: Proof of Concept
process.body: We quickly prototype the riskiest areas. Finding a problem in 2 weeks beats finding it after 6 months of development.

process.title: Ongoing support
process.body: We stay close during execution: technical reviews, decision support, weekly stand-ups.

deliverables: Technical and functional audit of product or process

web.hero: Websites and platforms that actually convert.
web.intro: Every site we build starts with one question: what should happen after the click? Design, content, performance and SEO work together toward a concrete business goal — inquiries, sales, qualified leads.

process.title: Brand strategy
process.body: Positioning, tone of voice, visual identity. Graphics come later — and better — once the message is clear.

process.title: Design & Prototyping
process.body: High-fidelity Figma wireframes and mockups. Usability tests before writing a single line of code.

process.title: High-performance build
process.body: Next.js, Tailwind, headless CMS. Lighthouse scores >95, optimized Core Web Vitals, technical SEO from day one.

process.title: Launch & Growth
process.body: Monitored go-live, analytics wired up, A/B tests on key flows. You get a site that improves over time.

deliverables: Integrations with CRM, analytics, email marketing

apps.hero: Native and cross-platform mobile apps, from idea to store.
apps.intro: Whether native Swift/Kotlin or cross-platform React Native, we build apps that work well in the real world — not just in demo videos. We think about offline, push, crashes, updates and the details users notice by the third tap.

process.title: Product discovery
process.body: We define essential MVP features together. Anything that doesn't need to ship at launch goes on the roadmap, not in the first release.

process.title: Mobile-first design
process.body: Interactions built for thumbs, not mice. Prototypes tested on real devices before development.

process.title: Development & QA
process.body: React Native, Swift or Kotlin depending on the case. Automated CI/CD, device farm testing, integrated crash reporting.

process.title: Publishing & maintenance
process.body: We handle App Store and Play Store, reviews and post-launch updates.

deliverables: App published on App Store and Google Play
Admin dashboard to manage users and content
Post-launch SLA for maintenance and support

ai.hero: AI and automations that actually save time.
ai.intro: Generative AI is powerful but only useful when integrated into real workflows. We don't build chatbots for show: we build agents that answer emails, qualify leads, extract data from documents and talk to your ERP.

process.title: Use case scoping
process.body: We identify repetitive processes with the highest ROI. We always start from a measurable use case, not from the tech.

process.title: Knowledge base & RAG
process.body: We index your internal documentation in a secure RAG system, so the agent answers with your data, not hallucinations.

process.title: Integrations
process.body: We connect AI to your tools: WhatsApp Business, Slack, email, CRM, ERPs. With Make, n8n, Zapier or custom code when needed.

process.title: Monitoring & optimization
process.body: We track answer accuracy, cost per conversation and user satisfaction. We tune prompts and models over time.

deliverables: AI agent integrated into your channels
Knowledge base your team can update

products.subtitle: Tools built by us — try free once.

qr.name: QR Studio
qr.body: Dynamic QRs with analytics, branding and redirects. First QR free, then sign up.

calc.name: Quote estimator
calc.body: Website, app, MVP or custom service: real-time estimate based on scope and timing.

paycheck.name: Payroll calculator
paycheck.body: Simulator with up-to-date Italian tax rates, for employer and employee.

cases.subtitle: How we helped Italian SMBs grow online.

odora.challenge: A complex fragrance catalog to navigate and stagnant conversion.
odora.solution: UX discovery, redesign of the choice flow and Shopify checkout optimization.

balance.challenge: Personal finance app to launch with tight timeline and coherent cross-platform design.
balance.solution: Product design, interactive prototypes, React Native build and gamified onboarding.

generale.challenge: Industrial operations based on paper and Excel misaligned across locations.
generale.solution: Custom web portal + automations integrated with ERP and warehouse.

about.title: 2erre SRL — digital, pragmatic, Italian.
about.body: We're an Italian software house specialized in digital products for SMBs. Born at the intersection of engineering and design, with the goal of building useful, fast and sustainable things.

v1.title: Pragmatic
v1.body: Clear scope, short milestones, zero over-engineering.

v2.title: Transparent
v2.body: Your code, honest estimates, weekly reports.

v3.title: Durable
v3.body: Standard stack, zero lock-in, long-term maintainability.
